5-Phase Content Strategy

Phase 1: Experience Centres

Hardware products for immersive property sales

  • Spatial Holo - Holographic displays
  • Spatial Agent - AI avatars (198 languages)
  • Spatial Touch - Interactive tables
  • Spatial Cave - 360 LED immersion
  • Spatial Tour - VR experiences
  • Spatial Lens, Table, Drive, Map

Phase 2: Spatial OS

One digital twin, every product

  • Spatial Twin - Photorealistic walkthroughs
  • Spatial Lite - Browser platform
  • Spatial Stream - Pixel streaming
  • Spatial Guide - Remote sales
  • Spatial World - Portfolio management
  • Spatial Cities - City-scale twins

Phase 3: Services

Content creation pipeline

  • 3D Rendering - Photorealistic viz
  • Animation - Cinematic flythroughs
  • Reality Capture - Matterport, LiDAR
  • Content Services - Full pipeline

Phase 4: Events

Spectacular launch experiences

  • SkyBox LED - Helicopter displays
  • Drone Shows - Up to 5,000 drones
  • Laser Shows - Synchronized spectacles
  • Nite Realm - Branded gaming

Phase 5: Industries

7 vertical markets

  • Real Estate - Primary market
  • Government - Smart Cities Mission
  • Hospitality - Virtual tours
  • Maritime - Port digital twins
  • Aviation - Airport terminals
  • Data Centres - Rack visibility
  • Giga Projects - Mega developments

Content Pillars

Key messaging themes

  • Product launches & deep-dives
  • Case studies & ROI data
  • India market insights
  • Founder thought leadership
  • Industry trend analysis
  • Buyer guides & comparisons
